title: Blackberry Portuguese Custard Tarts
description: A classic Portuguese dessert featuring a rich custard filling and a flaky crust, topped with sweet blackberries.
instructions: Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch and cut into 12 equal squares.
Transfer the squares to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
In a medium saucepan, combine the sugar, eggs, and port wine (if using).
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
Strain the mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean bowl.
Stir in the melted butter and confectioners' sugar.
Arrange the baked tart shells on a serving plate.
Spoon the custard mixture into the tart shells.
Top with blackberries and serve warm.
